Abu Md. Moniruzjaman

Additional Deputy Director (Horticulture), DAE, Kurigram

Dedicated public servant and policy architect driving digital transformation in Bangladesh agriculture. Leading initiatives in e-Bill blockchain systems, IPM adoption, smart farmer card implementation, and GreenLoop 3.0 circular agriculture — bridging governance and technology for rural empowerment.
